title: Resources and tools :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Tools and resources that immigration professionals may find useful.

## History of selection points for Skilled Migrant Expression of Interest
Expression of interest results

## Information for meeting criteria
Our visa criteria can contain a lot of supporting information. Our Applying online section contains information about how to apply and what document and proof is needed for visa applications.

## Application forms, guides and checklists
Find and download all immigration forms including visa application forms. Use the guides and checklists to help you make a complete and correct application.
Application forms, guides and checklists
In your day to day work you may need quick access to useful tools to help you and your clients.
List of Qualifications Recognised as an Exception
List of Qualifications Exempt from Assessment
Doctors who can do X-rays and medical examinations
Fees, decision times and where to apply

## Receive immigration updates
Sign up for regular email updates about changes to immigration rules and policies.
Sign up to receive immigration updates
